Uses of Package
neqsim.process.electricaldesign.components

Packages that use neqsim.process.electricaldesign.components
Package
Description
neqsim.process.electricaldesign
 
neqsim.process.electricaldesign.components
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.electricaldesign.components used by neqsim.process.electricaldesign
    Class
    Description
    ElectricalCable
    Model of an electrical power cable for process equipment.
    ElectricalMotor
    Model of an electric motor for process equipment.
    HazardousAreaClassification
    Model for hazardous area classification of process equipment locations.
    Switchgear
    Model of switchgear / motor control center (MCC) bucket for process electrical systems.
    Transformer
    Model of a power transformer for process electrical systems.
    VariableFrequencyDrive
    Model of a Variable Frequency Drive (VFD) for motor speed control.

    Description
    ElectricalMotor
    Model of an electric motor for process equipment.
